mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_like WHERE content_id = #{content_id}) AS like_count, c.title AS title, c.content_id AS content_id, c.start_at AS start_at, c.end_at AS end_at, c.location AS location, c.description AS description, c.adult_price AS adult_price, c.teen_price AS teen_price, c.child_price AS child_price, c.main_image_path AS main_image_path, c.detail_description as detail_description, c.reservation_type AS reservation_type
FROM content c WHERE c.content_id = #{content_id};
SELECT DISTINCT scheduled_at FROM content_schedule WHERE content_id=#{content_id} ORDER BY scheduled_at
